prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
**Pep Talk Time!**

Listen up, champ—you’ve been putting this off, but *you’ve got this*. That task isn’t as scary as your brain’s trying to make it. It’s just a challenge, and challenges are what make you stronger.

You’ve tackled hard things before, and you’ll do it again. Right now, the hardest part is *starting*—so just take one small step. Open the document, write one sentence, or set a timer for 10 minutes. Momentum will take care of the rest.

Remember: Procrastination is just fear in disguise. But fear doesn’t get to call the shots. *You* do. So take a deep breath, trust yourself, and dive in. You’re capable of way more than you think.

Now go crush it! 💪🔥
